M_memory_compound.measurement_method: Count .md files in .claude/memory/ written this month × grep citations in agent outputs / files not accessed in 90 days

E_exchange_density.measurement_method: Messages to/from ACG hub + TRIO handoffs (Aether→Chy→Morphe→Aether cycles)

F_feedback_quality.measurement_method: Agent invocations (grep 'Agent tool' in logs) × tasks with QA/security/integration-auditor sign-off / tasks shipped without verification

Scale_readiness.measurement_method: Qualitative: multi-model support, dept structure, automation coverage

R_recovery_speed.description: Time to rebuild capability after compaction/restart
R_recovery_speed.measurement_method: Minutes from fresh session start to full operational capability (wake-up protocol complete + first meaningful work output)

notes: Initial template created from ACG Wave 3 aiciv-mind package
Baseline measurement needed - run in next Deep Ceremony
Track monthly to measure intelligence compounding over time
